TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wu Kang RenÂê≥ÊÖ∑‰ªÅ == u siwkay niza Wu Kang Ren(1982.11.24) u Taywan a palaway, tatama a mato, nalecuhan i Kaoshong. 2009 a mihca mipalaw ku "kakacawan,sakadahi" sisa, singangan tu. 2013 a mihca, maala tu ku kawlah nu palaway. u mamidang niza ci Congyaw. (amicunus henay tu sulit ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Wu Kang-jen (Chinese: Âê≥ÊÖ∑‰ªÅ; Wade‚ÄìGiles: Wu K'ang-jen; born 24 November 1982) is a Taiwanese actor and model. He debuted in the short film Fragile in Love: Poetry in Motion in 2007, and first came to attention for his role in the 2009 television series Autumn's Concerto. He received his first acting award at the 18th Asian Television Awards for Best Actor in a Leading Role for his performance in the 2012 TV series Emerging Light. u kawlah niza 2009 a mihca saka11 Taypak iga a lisin, maala sakapahay baluhay a kawlah 2011 a mihca saka13 Taypak iga a lisin, maala sakapahay tatama palaway a kawlah 2013 a mihca saka8 Soul kanatal tilibi a kawlah, maala Taywan sakanamuhay a tatama palaway a kawlah 2013 a mihca saka18 Yaco tilibi tabakiay a kawlah, maala sakapahay iga tatama palaway a kawlah 2015 a mihca saka50 kingcong a kawlah, maala tilibe iga tatama makakilulay tatama palaway a kawlah. 2016 a mihca saka51 kingcong a kawlah, maala iga tatama palaway a kawlah 2017 a mihca saka52 kingcong a kawlah, maala iga tatama palaway a kawlah u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ)
S.PHON: == wu ka≈ã *…ôn*** == u siwkaj niza wu ka≈ã *…ôn(****.**.**) u tajwan a par~…æawaj, tatama a mato, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i kaosƒßo≈ã. **** a miƒß ¶a mipar~…æaw ku "kaka ¶awan,sakadaƒßi" sisa, si≈ãa≈ãan tu. **** a miƒß ¶a, maar~…æa tu ku kawr~…æaƒß nu par~…æawaj. u mamida≈ã niza ¶i ¶o≈ãjaw. (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit ***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam wu ka≈ã-j…ôn ( ¶ƒßin…ôs…ô: ***; wad…ô*gir~…æ…ôs: wu k î~ °a≈ã-j…ôn; born ** no*…ômb…ôr ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tor and mod…ôr~…æ. ƒß…ô d…ôbut…ôd in tƒß…ô sƒßort fir~…æm fragir~…æ…ô in r~…æo*…ô: po…ôtrj in motion in ****, and first ¶am…ô to att…ôntion for ƒßis ror~…æ…ô in tƒß…ô **** t…ôr~…æ…ô*ision s…ôri…ôs autumn î~ °s ¶on ¶…ôrto. ƒß…ô r…ô ¶…ôi*…ôd ƒßis first a ¶ti≈ã award at tƒß…ô **tƒß asian t…ôr~…æ…ô*ision awards for b…ôst a ¶tor in a r~…æ…ôadi≈ã *or~…æ…ô for ƒßis p…ôrforman ¶…ô in tƒß…ô **** t* s…ôri…ôs …ôm…ôrgi≈ã r~…æigƒßt. u kawr~…æaƒß niza **** a miƒß ¶a saka** tajpak iga a r~…æisin, maar~…æa sakapaƒßaj bar~…æuƒßaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** tajpak iga a r~…æisin, maar~…æa sakapaƒßaj tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka* sour~…æ kanatar~…æ tir~…æibi a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa tajwan sakanamuƒßaj a tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ja ¶o tir~…æibi tabakiaj a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa sakapaƒßaj iga tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ki≈ã ¶o≈ã a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa tir~…æib…ô iga tatama makakir~…æur~…æaj tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß. **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ki≈ã ¶o≈ã a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa iga tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ki≈ã ¶o≈ã a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa iga tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***)
S.FORM: == Wu Kang RenÂê≥ÊÖ∑‰ªÅ == u siwkay niza Wu Kang Ren(1982.11.24) u Taywan a palaway, tatama a mato, nalecuhan i Kaoshong. 2009 a mihca mipalaw ku "kakacawan,sakadahi" sisa, singangan tu. 2013 a mihca, maala tu ku kawlah nu palaway. u mamidang niza ci Congyaw. (amicunus henay tu sulit ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Wu Kang-jen (Chinese: Âê≥ÊÖ∑‰ªÅ; Wade‚ÄìGiles: Wu K'ang-jen; born 24 November 1982) is a Taiwanese actor and model. He debuted in the short film Fragile in Love: Poetry in Motion in 2007, and first came to attention for his role in the 2009 television series Autumn's Concerto. He received his first acting award at the 18th Asian Television Awards for Best Actor in a Leading Role for his performance in the 2012 TV series Emerging Light. u kawlah niza 2009 a mihca saka11 Taypak iga a lisin, maala sakapahay baluhay a kawlah 2011 a mihca saka13 Taypak iga a lisin, maala sakapahay tatama palaway a kawlah 2013 a mihca saka8 Soul kanatal tilibi a kawlah, maala Taywan sakanamuhay a tatama palaway a kawlah 2013 a mihca saka18 Yaco tilibi tabakiay a kawlah, maala sakapahay iga tatama palaway a kawlah 2015 a mihca saka50 kingcong a kawlah, maala tilibe iga tatama makakilulay tatama palaway a kawlah. 2016 a mihca saka51 kingcong a kawlah, maala iga tatama palaway a kawlah 2017 a mihca saka52 kingcong a kawlah, maala iga tatama palaway a kawlah u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ)
S.PHON: == wu ka≈ã *…ôn*** == u siwkaj niza wu ka≈ã *…ôn(****.**.**) u tajwan a par~…æawaj, tatama a mato, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i kaosƒßo≈ã. **** a miƒß ¶a mipar~…æaw ku "kaka ¶awan,sakadaƒßi" sisa, si≈ãa≈ãan tu. **** a miƒß ¶a, maar~…æa tu ku kawr~…æaƒß nu par~…æawaj. u mamida≈ã niza ¶i ¶o≈ãjaw. (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit ***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam wu ka≈ã-j…ôn ( ¶ƒßin…ôs…ô: ***; wad…ô*gir~…æ…ôs: wu k î~ °a≈ã-j…ôn; born ** no*…ômb…ôr ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tor and mod…ôr~…æ. ƒß…ô d…ôbut…ôd in tƒß…ô sƒßort fir~…æm fragir~…æ…ô in r~…æo*…ô: po…ôtrj in motion in ****, and first ¶am…ô to att…ôntion for ƒßis ror~…æ…ô in tƒß…ô **** t…ôr~…æ…ô*ision s…ôri…ôs autumn î~ °s ¶on ¶…ôrto. ƒß…ô r…ô ¶…ôi*…ôd ƒßis first a ¶ti≈ã award at tƒß…ô **tƒß asian t…ôr~…æ…ô*ision awards for b…ôst a ¶tor in a r~…æ…ôadi≈ã *or~…æ…ô for ƒßis p…ôrforman ¶…ô in tƒß…ô **** t* s…ôri…ôs …ôm…ôrgi≈ã r~…æigƒßt. u kawr~…æaƒß niza **** a miƒß ¶a saka** tajpak iga a r~…æisin, maar~…æa sakapaƒßaj bar~…æuƒßaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** tajpak iga a r~…æisin, maar~…æa sakapaƒßaj tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka* sour~…æ kanatar~…æ tir~…æibi a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa tajwan sakanamuƒßaj a tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ja ¶o tir~…æibi tabakiaj a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa sakapaƒßaj iga tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ki≈ã ¶o≈ã a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa tir~…æib…ô iga tatama makakir~…æur~…æaj tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß. **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ki≈ã ¶o≈ã a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa iga tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß **** a miƒß ¶a saka** ki≈ã ¶o≈ã a kawr~…æaƒß, maar~…æa iga tatama par~…æawaj a kawr~…æaƒß u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***)
